title: Spicy Chicken Curry Tacos
description: A fusion of Mexican and Malaysian flavors, these spicy chicken curry tacos are a bold twist on traditional tacos.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through.
Add the curry powder, chili powder, cumin, and smoked paprika to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the diced tomatoes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a portion of the chicken mixture onto a tortilla and topping with shredded cheese, sour cream, and cilantro.
Optional: Top with diced avocado, sliced jalapeños, or a sprinkle of queso fresco for added flavor and texture.
Serve with a side of Mexican street corn or a simple green salad for a delicious and well-rounded meal.
